UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Secure user information synchronized from Firebase Auth.

ChatSession.title: Chat Session
ChatSession.description: A conversation thread between a user and the AI.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: An individual message within a chat session.

/users/{userId}.description: Private user profiles. Only accessible by the owner or the system admin (ikbhai031@gmail.com).

/chats/{chatId}.description: Chat sessions. Only accessible by the creator or the system admin.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Messages within a session. Inherits parent session permissions.
